creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Thu, 3 Jun 2010, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/147389 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147389
>

Hi,

As stated in the Makefile, the graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool port tracks the 
"production release" of Exiftool as indicated at 
http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html

Since 8.20 is not a production release, I would not be inclined to apply 
this patch.

Thanks,
-- 
Tod McQuillin
